prompt: A clean business infographic for a board deck comparing quarterly revenue. Title at top: the exact text "FY2026 Quarterly Revenue" in large bold sans-serif, dark navy. Subtitle below: "Unit: million yen". Centered: a vertical bar chart with 4 bars labeled "Q1" "Q2" "Q3" "Q4" with values "12" "18" "27" "35" displayed above each bar. Bars in graduated teal-to-deep-blue, soft drop shadow. Y-axis shows gridlines at 0, 10, 20, 30, 40. Right side: a small annotation arrow with the text "+192% YoY" in coral. Background: very light gray, generous padding, board-deck-quality typography.
